snippet.title: The Lot: 'Rock star composer' Brian Tyler
snippet.description: If there’s such a thing as a "rock star composer," Brian Tyler is certainly it. He has scored some of the biggest box office hits of all time, from "Crazy Rich Asians" to Marvel movies. His latest film score is the new Super Mario Brothers movie. Suzanne Marques has more.

snippet.title: Joe Rogan was a SAVAGE..🥶
snippet.description:
Joe Rogan was a SAVAGE when it came to dealing with stalkers! In this hilarious video, he recalls the time when he was followed by a stalker and the hilarious conversation that ensued.

If you're ever been followed by a stalker, you need to watch this video. Joe Rogan is a real life hero when it comes to dealing with stalkers, and his advice is worth listening to! In this video, he teaches you how to deal with stalkers the smart way, and how to protect yourself from them!

snippet.title: Ranking Fox News DUMBEST Stories with Brian Tyler Cohen and Tommy Vietor | Liberal Tiers
snippet.description:
Former Obama spokesperson Tommy Vietor and political commentator Brian Tyler Cohen Draft the Dumbest Fox News Stories and Scandals

Featuring the Best of the Worst culture war segments from Fox News’ Tucker Carlson, Sean Hannity, and Laura Ingraham. Tommy and BTC trace dumb Republican outrage from the Obama Administration (tan suit, dijon mustard, fist jab) through the casting of The Little Mermaid, and the overly-inflated (and potentially dangerous) Chinese spy balloon coverage.

Comment below to let us know who you think has the Best/Worst list - BTC 🔵 or Tommy 🔴?

SUBSCRIBE to our channel 👉@podsaveamerica👈
SUBSCRIBE to BTC’s channel 👉@briantylercohen👈

00:00 - The Draft of the Dumbest Fox News Scandals
00:55 - 3D Printed Steaks from Gutfeld
02:10 - Obama Madrassa
03:36 - Little Mermaid Casting from Laura Ingraham
04:25 - Kitty Litter in Schools from Jesse Watters
05:32 - Woke M&M's from Tucker Carlson
06:26 - Terrorist Fist Jab
07:40 - Obama's Dijon Burger from Sean Hannity
09:21 - Balloonghazi featuring Kevin McCarthy
11:32 - Xbox Going Green
12:49 - Cancel Dr. Seuss
14:11 - BTC's Draft Picks
15:13 - Tommy's Draft Picks
16:20 - Honorable Mention: Obama's Tan Suit
16:52 - VOTE in the Comments

#FoxNews #PodSaveAmerica #obama 

CREDITS:
PRODUCER: Ben Hethcoat
SUPERVISING PRODUCER: Elijah Cone
EDITOR: Ben Hethcoat

Crooked believes that we need a better conversation about politics, culture, and the world around us—one that doesn’t just focus on what’s broken, but what we can do to fix it. At a time when it’s increasingly easy to feel cynical or hopeless, former Obama staffers Jon Favreau, Jon Lovett, and Tommy Vietor have created a place where people can have sane conversations that inform, entertain, and inspire action. In 2017 they started Crooked with Pod Save America—a no-bullshit conversation about politics. Since then, we continue to add shows, voices, and opportunities for activism, because it’s up to all of us to do our part to build a better world. That’s it. End of mission.

Learn more about Crooked at http://www.crooked.com
Follow the pod on Twitter https://twitter.com/podsaveamerica
Follow Crooked on Facebook https://www.facebook.com/CrookedMedia/ 
Follow Crooked on Instagram https://www.instagram.com/crookedmedia/

snippet.title: AC/DC with Steven Tyler "You Shook Me All Night Long" | Rock Hall 2003 Induction
snippet.description:
AC/DC performs "You Shook Me All Night Long" with special guest Steven Tyler (Aerosmith) at the 2003 Rock & Roll Hall of Fame Induction Ceremony. AC/DC specifically asked Steven Tyler to induct them into the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame because Aerosmith took AC/DC under their wing early on in their career. 

Performance Details:
– Inductee: AC/DC
– Inducted by: Steven Tyler
– Song: AC/DC “You Shook Me All Night Long”
– Event: 2003 Rock & Roll Hall of Fame Induction Ceremony

▶ More from the Rock Hall 2003 Induction Ceremony: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLuYH1Vrzl1TM2FYx117MZxCpqCyFBICFW&si=Kqw9DwQOy0wm6fjN
▶ AC/DC's Rock Hall bio: https://rockhall.com/inductees/acdc/

🔔 Subscribe for legendary performances, music history, induction stories, and more: https://bit.ly/RockHallYT

#ACDC #StevenTyler #RockHall2003 #Aerosmith #ClassicRock #YouShookMeAllNightLong
